system.docHtml: Provenzal is a tongue of the Pelwar family. Fluency measures the sophistication of expression in Provenzal, from the halting phrases of a traveler to the nuanced and learned discourse of a native speaker. As with all specific languages, this skill inherits its mechanics from the general [[Language]] skill; see [[Provenzal_Language|Provenzal Language]] for the linguistic and cultural background of the tongue itself.
